reachability_artifacts: built neutral/disabled/enabled telemetry command matrix behind a request-counting transport, recording install-ID filesystem hashes and exact request counts
PTY and non-PTY built verify/run fixtures proving one post-success invitation and suppression from JSON, pipe, redirect, CI, MCP, TUI, help, version, telemetry, and non-zero paths
built sworn telemetry preview output compared with a captured opted-in event from the shared production encoder

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; the implementer must confirm portable TTY detection and every machine-readable dispatch path before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent user can use account identity without losing provider credentials, changing model routes, purchasing managed inference, or generating unapproved outbound traffic.

positive_scenarios: After a meaningful interactive success, a user sees one useful invitation, previews the exact payload, and explicitly opts in.
An opted-in user can opt out persistently and observe truthful status.
negative_scenarios: Neutral, dismissed, opted-out, automated, or machine-readable use cannot create an ID or attempt telemetry delivery.
A telemetry failure cannot affect command output contracts, exit codes, or verdicts.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Showing value first and making the exact payload inspectable earns informed opt-in without compromising offline trust.

design_decisions.choice: Complete the full ratified explicit opt-in, preview, and value-led invitation contract in this release.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified 2026-07-15: full #118 scope, sole enabling gesture sworn telemetry on, exact no-network preview, and one post-success interactive invitation.
design_decisions.rationale: A partial consent repair would retain a known contradiction between the sender and the user experience.

design_decisions.choice: Treat only successful verify PASS and completed run as meaningful invitation triggers.
design_decisions.rationale: The invitation should follow demonstrated product value, not installation, help, or administrative gestures.
